characters.name: Thalren Deeproot
characters.description: A reclusive Earth Genasi hermit who channels the patience of stone through martial discipline.

characters.name: Kael Ironvow
characters.description: A disciplined Half-Orc soldier who fights with precision over brute force, wielding a longsword and shield.

characters.name: Lyris Songweaver
characters.description: A cheerful Halfling entertainer whose songs bolster allies and beguile foes.

characters.name: Brynna Ashward
characters.description: A direct human outlander whose rage makes her the front line for encounter testing.

characters.name: Sera Dawnmantle
characters.description: A steady human field-priest built to test healing, blessings, and shielded support play.

characters.name: Merrit Greenbough
characters.description: A watchful human hermit who tests nature magic, control spells, and wilderness utility.

characters.name: Oren Pathmark
characters.description: A quiet human guide built around ranged pressure, tracking skills, and light healing.

characters.name: Nyx Velorin
characters.description: A nimble human infiltrator for testing stealth, scouting, and precision attacks.

characters.name: Tavian Oathsteel
characters.description: A sworn human defender who tests high armor, weapon pressure, and early divine magic.

characters.name: Ivel Sparkvein
characters.description: A volatile human innate caster for testing cantrips, Shield, and simple arcane damage.

characters.name: Cassian Blackreed
characters.description: A pact-bound human caster for testing Eldritch Blast, Hex, and short-rest spell slots.

characters.name: Maelis Quill
characters.description: A prepared human scholar for testing broad first-level arcane spell coverage.

characters.name: Pip Coppercoil
characters.description: A practical human inventor for testing tool-flavored magic and support casting.

characters.name: [DEV] Maelis Quill (Lvl 5)
characters.description: A level 5 dev fixture for testing level 2 and 3 wizard spells like Misty Step and Fireball.

characters.name: [DEV] Sera Dawnmantle (Lvl 5)
characters.description: A level 5 dev fixture for testing level 2 and 3 cleric spells like Hold Person and Spirit Guardians.
